name: Lockheed Martin Space

overview.value: For more than a half-century, Lockheed Martin has led at the forefront of the space industry. Today, the Space business area's mission is to advance 21st Century Security, innovate with urgency and help our customers stay ahead of ready. Lockheed Martin Space drives innovation with legacy mission knowledge and scale, while providing end-to-end solutions.

focus.value: National security space, human and deep space exploration, and strategic & missile defense systems

notes: Added in the audit Phase 3 backfill (2026-07-08), verify-then-add.
